name: Ubiquiti UniFi Building Bridge XG
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Building Bridge XG
short_description: 60 GHz wireless bridge with a 10 Gbps SFP+ interface, 5GHz Radio for Backup, Pre-Paired Radios for Quick Setup Using UniFi App
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Building Bridge XG, cataloged under the model manufacture part number UBB-XG, stands as a pinnacle of wireless network bridging technology crafted by Ubiquiti Networks. This device is engineered to cater to the most demanding scenarios of high-capacity, wireless point-to-point connectivity, integrating seamlessly into the broader UniFi ecosystem. Tailored for enterprises requiring robust, high-throughput links, the UBB-XG leverages advanced wireless technologies to deliver unparalleled performance.

detailed_description.heading: A 60 GHz wireless point-to-point bridge with 500 meter maximum range and 10G SFP+ uplink for maximum performance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Building Bridge XG, cataloged under the model manufacture part number UBB-XG, stands as a pinnacle of wireless network bridging technology crafted by Ubiquiti Networks. This device is engineered to cater to the most demanding scenarios of high-capacity, wireless point-to-point connectivity, integrating seamlessly into the broader UniFi ecosystem. Tailored for enterprises requiring robust, high-throughput links, the UBB-XG leverages advanced wireless technologies to deliver unparalleled performance.

Central to the UBB-XG's capabilities is its dual-band operation, utilizing both the 60 GHz and 5 GHz frequencies to achieve optimal performance and reliability. The primary 60 GHz band is chosen for its ability to support extremely high data rates, making the UBB-XG capable of delivering multi-gigabit throughput, essential for bandwidth-intensive applications such as HD video streaming, massive data transfers, and high-speed internet access. This band is particularly effective in dense urban environments where the 5 GHz band might be congested, as it offers a clearer channel for communication. The inclusion of a 5 GHz radio as a backup ensures that connectivity is maintained even in adverse weather conditions that can affect the 60 GHz transmission, such as heavy rain or fog, providing an automatic failover to maintain network stability.

The UBB-XG distinguishes itself with its sophisticated antenna design, incorporating high-gain, directional antennas that focus the signal into a narrow beam. This focus minimizes interference and maximizes range and signal integrity, enabling the device to establish stable, long-distance links that are resistant to external noise and interference. The precision engineering of the antenna system, combined with advanced RF isolation techniques, ensures that the UBB-XG can deliver its high-capacity service over distances of up to several kilometers, making it ideal for connecting facilities that are geographically dispersed.

Housed in a sleek, industrial design, the UBB-XG's physical construction is as robust as its internal technology. The device is encased in a durable, weather-resistant shell that protects it from harsh environmental elements, ensuring reliable operation in a variety of outdoor settings. This makes the UBB-XG particularly well-suited for deployment in challenging conditions where traditional cabling solutions would be difficult or impossible to implement. The device also features a versatile mounting system, allowing for precise alignment and easy installation on poles, walls, or rooftops. Use the LED indicator to adjust the UBB position for optimal signal to the other bridge device.

Management of the UBB-XG is streamlined through integration with the UniFi Network Controller, Ubiquiti’s comprehensive network management solution. This software provides an intuitive interface for configuring, managing, and monitoring the UBB-XG, along with other devices within the UniFi ecosystem. Administrators can access detailed performance metrics, adjust network settings, and receive alerts, all from a centralized platform. This integration not only simplifies the management of the UBB-XG but also enhances the overall efficiency and visibility of the network.

detailed_description.heading: Package Contents
detailed_description.text:
[ul]
[li]UniFi Building-to-Building Bridge (x2)[/li]
[li]Mounting kit (x2)[/li]
[li]Gigabit PoE (48V, 0.32A) with mounting bracket (x2)[/li]
[li]Power cord (x2)[/li]
[/ul]
